message:
test(cve-arena): update bd-1f35 thread stress results after mixed_detach_join fix

The mixed_detach_join scenario previously exited with code 101 due to
a thread lifecycle bug. After the condvar TOCTOU race fix and test
serialization unification, this scenario now passes cleanly (exit 0).

- Update bd1f35_thread_stress_run.sh expected exit code: 101 -> 0
- Update conformance scenario definitions to match
- Refresh all bd-1f35 CVE arena results (hardened + strict profiles):
  stderr outputs shrink by ~230 lines total as debug/warning noise
  from the fixed race conditions is eliminated
- Update artifact_index.json, report.json, and trace.jsonl with
  the new pass/fail outcomes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -258,7 +258,7 @@ mixed_detach_join_cmd="for i in \$(seq 1 ${DETACH_JOIN_ITERS}); do cargo test -p
 for mode in strict hardened; do
   run_case "${mode}" "fanout_fanin_single" "${fanout_single_cmd}" 0 0 '{"create":1,"join":1,"detach":0}'
   run_case "${mode}" "create_join_churn" "${create_join_churn_cmd}" 0 0 "$(jq -nc --argjson n "${FANOUT_ITERS}" '{create:$n,join:$n,detach:0}')"
-  run_case "${mode}" "mixed_detach_join" "${mixed_detach_join_cmd}" 101 0 "$(jq -nc --argjson n "${DETACH_JOIN_ITERS}" '{create:$n,join:$n,detach:$n}')"
+  run_case "${mode}" "mixed_detach_join" "${mixed_detach_join_cmd}" 0 0 "$(jq -nc --argjson n "${DETACH_JOIN_ITERS}" '{create:$n,join:$n,detach:$n}')"
   run_case "${mode}" "c_fixture_pthread_common_adversarial" "${FIXTURE_BIN}" 1 0 '{"create":4,"join":4,"detach":0}'
 done

@@ -37,7 +37,7 @@

       "id": "mixed_detach_join",
       "description": "Mixed detach/join lifecycle churn sequence with deterministic current-mode contract capture.",
-      "expected_exit": 101,
+      "expected_exit": 0,
       "op_counts": {
         "create": "$FLC_BD1F35_DETACH_JOIN_ITERS",
         "join": "$FLC_BD1F35_DETACH_JOIN_ITERS",
